C

ClockItemFrameAdapter - Interface in io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.adapter
Platform-agnostic adapter wrapping an Item Frame containing a clock.
ClockItemFrameConstants - Class in io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.adapter
Shared constants for clock item frame name persistence across platforms.
ClockItemFrameRegistry - Class in io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.manager
Generic, thread-safe registry to track active item frames containing clocks.
ClockItemFrameRegistry() - Constructor for class io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.manager.ClockItemFrameRegistry
 
ClockItemFrameUpdater - Class in io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.manager
Platform-agnostic task runner that updates name tags of clocks inside item frames.
ClockItemFrameUpdater(ClockItemFrameRegistry, ClockMessageService, String, int, String) - Constructor for class io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.manager.ClockItemFrameUpdater

FABRIC_ORIGINAL_NAME_KEY - Static variable in class io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.adapter.ClockItemFrameConstants
The Fabric/NBT raw key for storing the original custom name in CUSTOM_DATA.

formatTicks(long) - Method in class io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.service.TimeFormatter

getClockMessage(WorldInfo, long, Locale) - Method in class io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.service.ClockMessageService
 
getFormattedTimeOnly(WorldInfo, long, Locale, String) - Method in class io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.service.ClockMessageService
Generates just the formatted time string (or wild spin symbol) for the item frame display name.

Gets the unique identifier key for the dimension (e.g.
getName() - Method in interface io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.model.WorldInfo
Gets the name of the world.
getTime() - Method in interface io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.model.WorldInfo
Gets the current game time of this world (in ticks).
getTrackedFrames() - Method in class io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.manager.ClockItemFrameRegistry
Returns all tracked clock item frame adapters.
getUniqueId() - Method in interface io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.adapter.ClockItemFrameAdapter
Returns the unique ID of the item frame.
getWorldName() - Method in interface io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.adapter.ClockItemFrameAdapter
Returns the name of the world/dimension this frame is placed in.

H

hasClock() - Method in interface io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.adapter.ClockItemFrameAdapter
Returns true if the item frame still contains a clock.

S

setClockCustomName(Component) - Method in interface io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.adapter.ClockItemFrameAdapter
Updates the custom name of the clock item inside the frame.

T

tick(WorldInfo) - Method in class io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.manager.ClockItemFrameUpdater
Performs a tick check and updates all tracked frames belonging to the given world.

U

unregister(ClockItemFrameAdapter) - Method in class io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.manager.ClockItemFrameRegistry
Unregisters a clock item frame adapter.
updateFrame(ClockItemFrameAdapter, WorldInfo) - Method in class io.github.beduality.clock_time.domain.manager.ClockItemFrameUpdater
Immediately updates the custom name of the clock item inside the item frame.
